intent: Summarise the key properties of the secp256k1 elliptic curve in three bullet points.
response:
The secp256k1 elliptic curve has three key properties:

• Prime field: Defined over a 256-bit prime field, giving approximately 128-bit security.
• Cofactor h=1: Every non-identity point generates the full group, which is important for cryptographic correctness.
• Efficient endomorphism: Supports a Frobenius endomorphism that enables a roughly 30% speedup in scalar multiplication, which is why it was chosen for Bitcoin and Ethereum.
